---
title: "Toy networks Modularity and SVD Entropy"
output:
  pdf_document: default
  html_document: default
editor_options:
  chunk_output_type: console
---
```{r, echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE,eval=TRUE}
require(tidyverse)
require(igraph)
require(multiweb)
require(rnetcarto)
require(igraph)
```



# Create toy networks 

```{r create3groupNetwork, echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}

# 3 independent chains - 3IC

g <-   graph_from_literal( 1 -+ 4 -+ 7,2 -+ 5 -+8, 3 -+ 6 -+9, simplify = FALSE)
plot_troph_level_ggplot(g,modules = TRUE)
svden <- tibble(name="3IC",igraph=list(g))

# 3 3 level trophic chains one basal species
g <-   graph_from_literal( 1 -+ 4 -+ 7,1 -+ 5 -+8, 1 -+ 6 -+9, simplify = FALSE)
plot_troph_level_ggplot(g,modules = TRUE)
svden <- svden %>% add_row(name="3IC-1BA",igraph=list(g))

# Add top predator - 3IC -TP 
g <-   graph_from_literal( 1 -+ 4 -+ 7,2 -+ 5 -+8, 3 -+ 6 -+9,11+-4:8:6:7, simplify = FALSE)
plot_troph_level_ggplot(g,modules = TRUE)
svden <- svden %>% add_row(name="3IC-TP",igraph=list(g))

# Add links among chains from basal species to 2nd trophic level
g1 <-   graph_from_literal( 1 -+ 4 -+ 7,2 -+ 5 -+8, 3 -+ 6 -+9,11+-4:8:6:7, 3-+5,2-+6,2-+4,1-+5, simplify = FALSE)
plot_troph_level_ggplot(g1,modules = TRUE)
svden <- svden %>% add_row(name="3IC-TP-BL",igraph=list(g1))

# Add intermediate species 

g <-   graph_from_literal( 1 -+ 4 -+ 7 ,2 -+ 5 -+8, 3 -+ 6 -+9,11+-4:8:6:7,
                           1 -+ 12 -+ 7,2 -+ 13 -+8,3 -+ 10 -+9, simplify = FALSE)
plot_troph_level_ggplot(g,modules = TRUE)

svden <- svden %>% add_row(name="3IC-TP-IS",igraph=list(g))

# Add crossed links 

g <-   graph_from_literal( 1 -+ 4 -+ 7 ,2 -+ 5 -+8, 3 -+ 6 -+9,11+-4:8:6:7,
                           1 -+ 12 -+ 7,2 -+ 13 -+8,3 -+ 10 -+9,
                           1 -+ 6, 2 -+ 4, 3 -+ 5,
                           simplify = FALSE)
plot_troph_level_ggplot(g,modules = TRUE)

svden <- svden %>% add_row(name="3IC-TP-IS-CL",igraph=list(g))

# Add omnivors crossed links 

g <-   graph_from_literal( 1 -+ 4 -+ 7 ,2 -+ 5 -+8, 3 -+ 6 -+9,11+-4:8:6:7,
                           1 -+ 12 -+ 7,2 -+ 13 -+8,3 -+ 10 -+9,
                           1 -+ 8, 2 -+ 9, 3 -+ 8,
                           simplify = FALSE)
plot_troph_level_ggplot(g,modules = TRUE)

svden <- svden %>% add_row(name="3IC-TP-IS-CL-OM",igraph=list(g))

# We add 100 to all node numbers, then species 11 = 111 is basal, we have more basal species, more top predators less trophic level

g1 <- graph_from_literal(101 -+ 104 -+ 107, 102 -+ 105 -+ 108, 103 -+ 106 -+ 109, 111 -+ 104:108:106:107,
                               101 -+ 112 -+ 107, 102 -+ 113 -+ 108, 103 -+ 110 -+ 109,
                               101 -+ 108, 102 -+ 109, 103 -+ 108,
                               simplify = FALSE)
plot_troph_level_ggplot(g1,modules = TRUE)
svden <- svden %>% add_row(name="3IC-2TP-IS-CL-OM-BA",igraph=list(g1))

# We combine g and g1 and add a link from 8 to 108
g3 <- graph_from_literal(8 -+ 108)

g2 <- g+g1+g3
plot_troph_level_ggplot(g2,modules = TRUE)

svden <- svden %>% add_row(name="3IC-TP-IS-CL-OM-BA-CO",igraph=list(g2))

# @Sanders2018

g <-   graph_from_literal( 1 -+ 4 -+ 7 -+ 3,1 -+ 5 -+8 -+ 3, 1 -+ 6 -+9 -+ 3, simplify = FALSE)
plot_troph_level_ggplot(g,modules = TRUE)
svden <-  svden %>% add_row(name="SAN-A",igraph=list(g))


g <-   graph_from_literal( 1 -+ 4 -+ 7 -+ 3,1 -+ 5 -+8 -+ 3, 1 -+ 6 -+9 -+ 3, 2 -+ 10 -+ 11 -+ 3,4-+10,6-+10, simplify = FALSE)
plot_troph_level_ggplot(g,modules = TRUE)
svden <-  svden %>% add_row(name="SAN-C",igraph=list(g))

```


```{r calc_metrics}

# ⚡ Función para calcular métricas de un grafo
calc_all_metrics <- function(g) {
  svd_res <- calc_svd_entropy(g)
  mod <- run_infomap(g)
  topo <- multiweb::calc_topological_indices(g)

  tibble(
    C = topo$Connectance,
    S = topo$Size,
    LD = topo$LD,
    TLmean = topo$TLmean,
    Vulnerability = topo$Vulnerability,
    Generality = topo$Generality,
    Entropy = svd_res$Entropy,
    Rank = svd_res$Rank,
    RankDeficiency = 1 - (Rank / S),
    Modularity = modularity(mod),
    Groups = length(mod)
  )
}

# ⚡ 1. Calcular métricas para las redes observadas (ya lo tenías)
svden <- svden %>%
  mutate(metrics_emp = map(igraph, calc_all_metrics)) %>%
  unnest(metrics_emp)

# ⚡ Generar redes con el modelo de nicho
svden_sim <- svden %>% dplyr::select(name, C, S)  %>%
  mutate(
    igraph = map2(S, C, ~ generate_niche(S = .x, C = .y, nsim = 1)),
    name = paste0("niche_", name),
    metrics = map(igraph, calc_all_metrics)
  ) %>% dplyr::select(-S,-C) %>%
  unnest(metrics) #, names_sep = "niche_")

# ⚡ Combinar en un solo tibble
svden <- bind_rows(svden_sim, svden)
# Asegurar que tenemos la columna "type"
svden_all <- svden %>%
  mutate(type = ifelse(grepl("^niche_", name), "Niche model", "Empirical"))

# 📊 Comparar C vs Entropy
ggplot(svden_all, aes(x = C, y = Entropy, color = type, shape = type)) +
  geom_point(size = 3, alpha = 0.8) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = FALSE) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("Empirical" = "darkgreen", "Niche model" = "steelblue")) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  labs(
    x = "Connectance (C)",
    y = "SVD Entropy",
    color = "Network type",
    shape = "Network type",
  )


# 📊 Comparar C vs Rank Deficiency
ggplot(svden_all, aes(x = C, y = RankDeficiency, color = type, shape = type)) +
  geom_point(size = 3, alpha = 0.8) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = FALSE) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("Empirical" = "darkgreen", "Niche model" = "steelblue")) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  labs(
    x = "Connectance (C)",
    y = "Rank Deficiency (1 - Rank/S)",
    color = "Network type",
    shape = "Network type",
  )

ggplot(svden_all, aes(x = Modularity, y = Entropy, color = type, shape = type)) +
  geom_point(size = 3, alpha = 0.8) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = FALSE) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("Empirical" = "darkgreen", "Niche model" = "steelblue")) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  labs(
    color = "Network type",
    shape = "Network type",
  )


```

# Niche model and SVD Entropy / Rank

```{r niche_model, echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}

# load network_info
network_info <- readRDS("Data/network_info.rds")


network_info <- filter(network_info, !(site %in% c("WeddellSea","BeagleChannel","NorthernScotia","SouthernScotia")))

# ---- Rango observado en datos empíricos ----
S_min <- min(network_info$S)
S_max <- max(network_info$S)
C_min <- min(network_info$C)
C_max <- max(network_info$C)

# Expandir 10%
S_min <- floor(S_min * 0.8)
S_max <- ceiling(S_max * 1.2)
C_min <- C_min * 0.8
C_max <- C_max * 1.2

generate_niche(S_max,C_min)

# ---- Función para simular una red y calcular métricas ----
calc_sim_metrics <- function(S, C) {
  g <- generate_niche(S, C, nsim = 1)
  A <- as.matrix(as_adjacency_matrix(g, sparse = FALSE))
  svde <- calc_svd_entropy(A)

  tibble(
    Entropy = svde$Entropy,
    rankDeficiency = 1 - (svde$Rank / vcount(g))
  )
}

# ---- Simulación de 1000 redes ----
library(furrr)
library(future)
num_cores <- future::availableCores()
plan(multisession, workers = num_cores)  # or your preferred plan

set.seed(123) # reproducibilidad

sim_results <- tibble(
  S = sample(S_min:S_max, 100, replace = TRUE),
  C = runif(100, C_min, C_max)
) %>%
  mutate(metrics =future_map2(S, C, calc_sim_metrics, .progress = TRUE, 
                              .options = furrr_options(seed = TRUE))) %>%
  unnest(metrics)

plan(sequential)

# ---- Vista rápida ----
head(sim_results)

# ---- Graficar ----
library(ggplot2)

ggplot(sim_results, aes(x = C, y = rankDeficiency, color = S)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.6) +
  scale_color_viridis_c() +
  theme_bw() +
  labs(
    x = "SVD Entropy",
    y = "Rank Deficiency",
    color = "Species (S)"
    ) +
  geom_point(data=network_info, aes(x=C, y=1 - Rank/S), size=3)



sim_results  %>%  ggplot( aes(x = C, y = Entropy, color = S)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.6) +
  scale_color_viridis_c() +
  theme_bw() +
  labs(
    y = "SVD Entropy",
    color = "Species (S)",
    title = "Niche model simulations"
    ) +
  geom_point(data=network_info, aes(x=C, y=Entropy), size=3)

sim_results  %>%  ggplot( aes(x = S, y = Entropy, color = S)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.6) +
  scale_color_viridis_c() +
  theme_bw() +
  labs(
    y = "SVD Entropy",
    color = "Species (S)",
    title = "Niche model simulations"
    ) +
  geom_point(data=network_info, aes(x=S, y=Entropy), size=3)


## Con redes aleatorias
# ---- Función para simular una red y calcular métricas ----
calc_sim_metrics1 <- function(S, C) {
  g <- sample_gnm(S, floor( C*S^2), directed = TRUE)
  A <- as.matrix(as_adjacency_matrix(g, sparse = FALSE))
  svde <- calc_svd_entropy(A)

  tibble(
    Entropy = svde$Entropy,
    rankDeficiency = 1 - (svde$Rank / vcount(g))
  )
}

num_cores <- future::availableCores()
plan(multisession, workers = num_cores)  # or your preferred plan

set.seed(123) # reproducibilidad

sim_results <- tibble(
  S = sample(S_min:S_max, 100, replace = TRUE),
  C = runif(100, C_min, C_max)
) %>%
  mutate(metrics =future_map2(S, C, calc_sim_metrics1, .progress = TRUE,
                              .options = furrr_options(seed = TRUE))) %>%
  unnest(metrics)

plan(sequential)

ggplot(sim_results, aes(x = S, y = rankDeficiency, color = S)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.6) +
  scale_color_viridis_c() +
  theme_bw() +
  labs(
    x = "S",
    y = "Rank Deficiency"
    ) +
  geom_point(data=network_info, aes(x=S, y=1 - Rank/S), size=3, shape=17) + guides(color = "none")



sim_results  %>%  ggplot( aes(x = C, y = Entropy, color = S)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.6) +
  scale_color_viridis_c() +
  theme_bw() +
  labs(
    y = "SVD Entropy",
    color = "Species (S)",
    title = "Random model simulations"
    ) +
  geom_point(data=network_info, aes(x=C, y=Entropy), size=3)

sim_results  %>%  ggplot( aes(x = S, y = Entropy, color = S)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.6) +
  scale_color_viridis_c() +
  theme_bw() +
  labs(
    y = "SVD Entropy",
    color = "Species (S)"
    ) +
  geom_point(data=network_info, aes(x=S, y=Entropy), size=3, shape=17) + guides(color = "none")

ggsave("Figures/random_vs_empirical_SVDE.png", 
          height = 6, 
          width = 10,
          bg = "white")

```
